daily.today_energy: Your creative fire is burning bright—channel it into something that actually matters to you. The universe is basically cheering you on to trust your instincts today.
daily.love: Someone might be picking up on your confident energy and honestly? Let them. If you're single, connection vibes are flowing. If coupled, remind your person why you're kind of amazing.
daily.career: Your ideas are hitting different today. Speak up in that meeting or project—your perspective is needed. Trust that you know your lane better than anyone else does.
daily.health: Your body's asking you to move it in a way that feels good, not punishing. Whether that's dancing, walking, or stretching, listen to what energizes you rather than drains you.

weekly.overview: Mercury's moving through your sector of self-expression this week, Leo. It's giving main character energy but make it introspective. You're about to unlock some real clarity on what you actually want versus what you thought you should want.
weekly.love: Venus is playing coy right now, but that's kinda hot? Use this week to get clear on your boundaries and what genuine connection means to you. Single or coupled, authenticity is your love language this cycle.
weekly.career: Your professional instincts are sharp as hell. Trust that gut feeling about a project or opportunity. This is the week to speak up about your ideas, but lead with listening first. Collaboration over ego moves mountains.
weekly.health: Your energy levels are fluctuating but that's okay—listen to what your body needs. Balance intense workouts with actual rest. Hydration and sleep are your real MVPs this week, not productivity burnout.
